steps.title: Identify the noun roles
steps.content: The sentence refers to the number of terms that presidents can serve. The first blank part must be the plural noun for repeated terms, and the second must be the plural noun for presidents in general.

steps.title: Avoid possessives
steps.content: B incorrectly makes "term" possessive. C makes both nouns possessive and singular. D makes "president" possessive. The sentence needs ordinary plural nouns, not possessive forms. The answer is A.
